COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-22-2004 Text Ruling

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-22-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tina Paxton.
Matthew Wertheim, Esq. for Plaintiff S.P. Tarantino Insurance Brokerage, Inc.,
Plaintiff's witness: Don Tarantino was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants: Reefer Depot Services Trucking, Inc. and Reefer Depot Trucking, Inc. as follows:
Damages in the amount of $269,567.00
Costs of $225.00
For the total of $269,792.00
Judgment signed in open court.
